name: Archon: The Light and the Dark
description:
Archon is a turn-based strategy game played on a checkered board where two opposing forces, Light and Dark, battle for control of five Power Points scattered across the game board. Each side commands a variety of creatures, each with unique combat abilities and movement speeds. The game combines strategic movement and resource management on the main board with real-time combat sequences. 

During each turn, players can move their creatures across the board, aiming to occupy the Power Points. When two opposing creatures land on the same square, a combat arena appears. Within this arena, the two creatures engage in a real-time battle. Creature stats like health, attack power, and attack speed influence the outcome of the battle, as well as the terrain of the combat arena, which can vary in each engagement. The winner of the battle occupies the square on the main board. 

The overall goal is to control all five Power Points simultaneously or eliminate all enemy creatures. Strategic positioning, exploiting creature strengths, and understanding terrain advantages in combat are crucial for victory. The game features a variety of creatures for both sides, ranging from slow, powerful melee fighters to fast, weaker ranged attackers. Choosing the right creature for each situation is key to success.

controls.arrow_up: Move selected unit up on the main board.
controls.arrow_down: Move selected unit down on the main board.
controls.arrow_left: Move selected unit left on the main board.
controls.arrow_right: Move selected unit right on the main board.
controls.w: Move combat unit up in the combat arena.
controls.s: Move combat unit down in the combat arena.
controls.a: Move combat unit left in the combat arena.
controls.d: Move combat unit right in the combat arena.
controls.space: Attack with selected unit in the combat arena or end turn on the main board.
controls.shift: Select the next available unit on the main board.
controls.q: Cast a spell. If multiple spells available, cycles to the next spell.
controls.z: Display unit information on main board.
